FunctionsF4: Competitive Position Measurement
F4conditional

Competitive Position Measurement

How does the delivered network experience compare to what competitors deliver in the same geography?

Law V: Competitive Relativity

If Absent

Network improvement is measured against internal baselines. Competitive gaps persist undetected. NPS improvements may lag competitor improvements, generating churn despite internal KPI progress.

At L4 — Autonomous Networks

optimisation-target-input

Competitive benchmarks feed directly into autonomous optimisation targets. Geography-specific competitive gaps trigger resource reallocation without requiring manual analysis or planning cycles.

Tool Coverage

○None

active monitoring

○None

passive probe

●Full

drive test

●Full

crowdsourced

○None

cem

Tools That Serve This Function

Active Monitoring

Emblasoft Evolver (Functional Testing)

Emblasoft

Functional testing capability within Evolver for validating network features and updates, supporting CI/CD schedules. Any scenario can be modelled for proving service capabilities in multi-vendor networks.

●F3●F4●F9◑F1
Passive Probe

Emblasoft nScan (Analytics)

Emblasoft

Advanced analytics layer within nScan providing competitive visibility, deep KPI trending and anomaly detection across millions of real subscriber records using high-performance column-based data storage.

●F4◑F9◑F1

Use Cases This Function Enables

Law VF4combination

Competitive Gap Detection

nScan analytics shows operator median 5G throughput 30% below market leader in three consecutive months in top-5 revenue cities.

L1L2L3L4
Competitive parity restored in high-revenue geographies before NPS gap widens into churn acceleration.
